name: IdsEdwLoadMadorRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSSC' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MADOR_1099' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BcbsScRunCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD UNION SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MADOR_1099' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.FctsRunCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD UNION SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'UWS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MADOR_1099' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.UwsRunCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS T INNER JOIN cte C ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = C.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = C.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = C.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= C.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Description:
MODIFICATIONS: 

Called from IdsEdwMadorCntl
                                                                                                                                                                              	DATASTAGE               CODE                           DATE
DEVELOPER             DATE                PROJECT          		DESCRIPTION                                        ENVIRONMENT          REVIEWER                 REVIEW
-----------------------------    ----------------------     -----------------------   		 --------------------------------------------------             ----------------------------       ------------------------------       --------------------
Deepika C                   2023-01-25         US 557759                     New Programming. Update EDW_LOAD_IN       EnterpriseDev2          Jeyaprasanna              2023-01-25
                              	                                                                    to Y on P_RUN_CYC

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS MADOR with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
Job Name: IdsEdwLoadMadorRunCycUpd

Description: This Job update the P_RUN_CYC  table after the MADOR are updated on the EDW Table.
Called from: IdsEdwMadorCntl
